creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 245710
Patch to update lang/scala to 3.3.1

Hi,

here is a patch to upgrade the lang/scala port to version 3.3.1 which is considered a LTS version (3.3.x line).

The changelog would be huge therefore here only a reference to the releases url with the release notes: https://github.com/lampepfl/dotty/releases

Kind regards,

Jens
